sql_array: CREATE TABLE resources (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), owner_uid INT, properties XML);
INSERT INTO resources (name, owner_uid, properties) VALUES ('ResourceA', 1, '<property><name>example</name><value>value1</value></property>');
INSERT INTO resources (name, owner_uid, properties) VALUES ('ResourceB', 1, '<property><name>example</name><value>value2</value></property>');
SELECT DB.DBA.DAV_PROP_SET(':virtowneruid', '2'::VARCHAR, id) FROM resources WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM resources WHERE name = 'ResourceA');

SELECT id, DB.DBA.DAV_PROP_SET(':propertyName', id::VARCHAR) FROM resources WHERE BIF:ST_OVERLAPS(SELECT properties FROM resources WHERE name = 'ResourceB', '<some_spatial_data>') HAVING COUNT(id) > 0;
UPDATE resources SET properties = DB.DBA.DAV_PROP_REMOVE(':virtualprop', 0) WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM resources WHERE owner_uid IS NULL) AND id::VARCHAR = (SELECT UNNEST(ARRAY[1,2,3])::VARCHAR);
